GitHub

Authors and References

List of authors

Valentin Link, Konrad Mickiewicz, Matteo Garbellini

This code is based on algorithms introduced in the papers below.

Basic uniTEMPO algorithm

@article{link2024,
	title = {{Open Quantum System Dynamics from Infinite Tensor Network Contraction}},
	author = {Link, Valentin and Tu, Hong-Hao and Strunz, Walter T.},
	journal = {Phys. Rev. Lett.},
	volume = {132},
	number = {20},
	pages = {200403},
	year = {2024},
	month = may,
	publisher = {American Physical Society},
	doi = {10.1103/PhysRevLett.132.200403}
}

Fourier-space correlations

@misc{garbellini2026,
  title = {Uniform Process Tensor Approach for the Calculation of Multi-Time Correlation Functions of Non-{{Markovian}} Open Systems},
  author = {Garbellini, Matteo and Mickiewicz, Konrad and Link, Valentin and Eisfeld, Alexander and Strunz, Walter T.},
  year = 2026,
  month = mar,
  number = {arXiv:2603.04970},
  eprint = {2603.04970},
  primaryclass = {quant-ph},
  publisher = {arXiv},
  doi = {10.48550/arXiv.2603.04970},
  archiveprefix = {arXiv},
}

Generic uniTEMPO (non-commuting)

@misc{link2026,
  title = {Tensor Network Influence Functionals for Open Quantum Systems with General {{Gaussian}} Bosonic Baths},
  author = {Link, Valentin},
  year = 2026,
  month = mar,
  number = {arXiv:2603.23432},
  eprint = {2603.23432},
  primaryclass = {quant-ph},
  publisher = {arXiv},
  doi = {10.48550/arXiv.2603.23432},
  archiveprefix = {arXiv},
}

Floquet dynamics

@misc{mickiewicz2025,
  title = {Exact {{Floquet}} Dynamics of Strongly Damped Driven Quantum Systems},
  author = {Mickiewicz, Konrad and Link, Valentin and Strunz, Walter T.},
  year = 2025,
  month = nov,
  number = {arXiv:2511.08754},
  eprint = {2511.08754},
  primaryclass = {quant-ph},
  publisher = {arXiv},
  doi = {10.48550/arXiv.2511.08754},
  archiveprefix = {arXiv},
}
